programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) JUNINHO
programme.sub-title: At the height of his career, Brazilian midfielder Juninho Paulista made a decision that would make him a legend on Teeside forever. The 2002 World Cup winner wrote his name into Middlesbrough F.C. folklore when he signed for the club not once, not twice, but three times! He sits down with PL Stories to reflect on his fond memories of that time, his emotional reaction to their relegation and find out what he’s up to now after hanging up his boots.
programme.desc: At the height of his career, Brazilian midfielder Juninho Paulista made a decision that would make him a legend on Teeside forever. The 2002 World Cup winner wrote his name into Middlesbrough F.C. folklore when he signed for the club not once, not twice, but three times! He sits down with PL Stories to reflect on his fond memories of that time, his emotional reaction to their relegation and find out what he’s up to now after hanging up his boots.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP34: (Subbed) MICHU
programme.sub-title: Despite only featuring in one full Premier League season, in 2012/13, Miguel Pérez Cuesta – AKA, Michu, remains one of the most iconic signings in Swansea City’s history. Now a Sporting Director back in his homeland of Spain, Michu looks back on his time in the Premier League which saw him achieve cult status in South Wales, as well as reflect on what could have been but for injuries that saw his playing career cruelly cut short.
programme.desc: Despite only featuring in one full Premier League season, in 2012/13, Miguel Pérez Cuesta – AKA, Michu, remains one of the most iconic signings in Swansea City’s history. Now a Sporting Director back in his homeland of Spain, Michu looks back on his time in the Premier League which saw him achieve cult status in South Wales, as well as reflect on what could have been but for injuries that saw his playing career cruelly cut short.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP32: (Subbed) THOMAS TUCHEL
programme.sub-title: As Thomas Tuchel begins his journey as England’s new manager, PL Stories dives into his journey to the top, tracing his rise from playing career to football management. After facing financial struggles and working in a bar, Tuchel’s determination led him to become one of the Premier League's most respected managers. We showcase his unique path, blending hard work, passion, and tactical innovation to reach the pinnacle of football.
programme.desc: As Thomas Tuchel begins his journey as England’s new manager, PL Stories dives into his journey to the top, tracing his rise from playing career to football management. After facing financial struggles and working in a bar, Tuchel’s determination led him to become one of the Premier League's most respected managers. We showcase his unique path, blending hard work, passion, and tactical innovation to reach the pinnacle of football.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP26: THE GREATEST GAME EVER PLAYED
programme.sub-title: We gather a panel of experts to tackle a nearly impossible question: What truly is the Greatest Premier League Game Ever? Join two ex-footballers, a seasoned commentator, and a top football journalist as they lock horns in a passionate roundtable discussion. The panel revisits iconic moments, dissecting tactics, and legendary performances. Expect banter, bold claims, and maybe even a few surprises, as they strive to settle the debate—or perhaps keep it alive. Whether reliving “Fergie Time” magic, Leicester’s miracle season, or Aguero’s legendary finish, this episode celebrates the unfiltered drama that only Premier League history can offer.
programme.desc: We gather a panel of experts to tackle a nearly impossible question: What truly is the Greatest Premier League Game Ever? Join two ex-footballers, a seasoned commentator, and a top football journalist as they lock horns in a passionate roundtable discussion. The panel revisits iconic moments, dissecting tactics, and legendary performances. Expect banter, bold claims, and maybe even a few surprises, as they strive to settle the debate—or perhaps keep it alive. Whether reliving “Fergie Time” magic, Leicester’s miracle season, or Aguero’s legendary finish, this episode celebrates the unfiltered drama that only Premier League history can offer.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.
programme.desc: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.sub-title: From humble beginnings as a footballer in Melbourne to becoming Tottenham’s manager, we chart the meteoric rise of Australian Ange Postecoglou. We speak to those that knew him best to find out what makes him tick and delve into his unique coaching style that has brought him success wherever he’s been.

programme.title: THE ART OF... EP01: GOALKEEPING
programme.sub-title: The Art Of... invites a former pro and master of their craft into the Tech Zone for tactical, analytical, and anecdotal insight to uncover just what it takes to get to the very top of their field, be it Attacking, Defending, Goalkeeping, or Managing.
programme.desc: The Art Of... invites a former pro and master of their craft into the Tech Zone for tactical, analytical, and anecdotal insight to uncover just what it takes to get to the very top of their field, be it Attacking, Defending, Goalkeeping, or Managing.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP24: MICHAEL OWEN
programme.sub-title: Honest and engaging from the start, Michael Owen opens to the Big Interview, offering a fascinating insight into the career and psyche of one of the game’s most polarising characters. Owen shares all, from recounting his days as a childhood prodigy to debating what might have been had he not torn his hamstring at 19 years of age or left Liverpool for Real Madrid. Honest, raw, at times combative, Owen bares all and will have you asking…Premier League great or unfulfilled talent?
programme.desc: Honest and engaging from the start, Michael Owen opens to the Big Interview, offering a fascinating insight into the career and psyche of one of the game’s most polarising characters. Owen shares all, from recounting his days as a childhood prodigy to debating what might have been had he not torn his hamstring at 19 years of age or left Liverpool for Real Madrid. Honest, raw, at times combative, Owen bares all and will have you asking…Premier League great or unfulfilled talent?

programme.title: PL REWIND EP10: MICHAEL OWEN: MY BREAKTHROUGH YEARS
programme.sub-title: Michael Owen burst onto the scene for Liverpool at just seventeen years of age, and in two consecutive seasons the teenage sensation won the Premier League Golden Boot. Owen recalls those campaigns for the Reds, reliving the key moments that helped him develop into one of the greatest players of his generation.
programme.desc: Michael Owen burst onto the scene for Liverpool at just seventeen years of age, and in two consecutive seasons the teenage sensation won the Premier League Golden Boot. Owen recalls those campaigns for the Reds, reliving the key moments that helped him develop into one of the greatest players of his generation.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP04: BOU v LUT 23/24
programme.sub-title: In December 2023, Bournemouth v Luton is abandoned when Tom Lockyer faced a life-threatening situation on the pitch. He survived and watched the rematch, which turned into a Premier League classic. Andoni Iraola, Lewis Cook and Antoine Semenyo tell the story.
programme.desc: In December 2023, Bournemouth v Luton is abandoned when Tom Lockyer faced a life-threatening situation on the pitch. He survived and watched the rematch, which turned into a Premier League classic. Andoni Iraola, Lewis Cook and Antoine Semenyo tell the story.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP07: BOURNEMOUTH
programme.sub-title: Matt Richie and Charlie Daniels are the guests for a special edition of PL Moments which discusses Bournemouth’s rise from administration to the Premier League.
programme.desc: Matt Richie and Charlie Daniels are the guests for a special edition of PL Moments which discusses Bournemouth’s rise from administration to the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP26: ANTOINE SEMENYO
programme.sub-title: Having taken an unconventional journey to the Premier League, Antoine Semenyo’s influence has been a major factor in Bournemouth’s remarkable season so far. Coming through grassroots football as a youth player, Semenyo tells The Big Interview of the struggles he faced in finding a club in those early years, how his father’s brief football career inspired him to keep pushing himself and how Andoni Iraola is taking Bournemouth to another level.
programme.desc: Having taken an unconventional journey to the Premier League, Antoine Semenyo’s influence has been a major factor in Bournemouth’s remarkable season so far. Coming through grassroots football as a youth player, Semenyo tells The Big Interview of the struggles he faced in finding a club in those early years, how his father’s brief football career inspired him to keep pushing himself and how Andoni Iraola is taking Bournemouth to another level.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP15: TIM CAHILL
programme.sub-title: With over 200 appearances for Everton, Tim Cahill established himself as the high-energy midfielder who helped drive the side. programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Everton v Liverpool

programme.title: PL STORIES EP14: (Subbed) NEMANJA VIDIC
programme.sub-title: Nemanja Vidić grew up in war-torn Serbia and went on to become one of the greatest defenders in English football. PL Stories sits down with him to explore his journey from Belgrade to Manchester. We also hear from former coaches and players about how his childhood shaped him into the person he is today and his lasting impact on the Premier League.
programme.desc: Nemanja Vidić grew up in war-torn Serbia and went on to become one of the greatest defenders in English football. PL Stories sits down with him to explore his journey from Belgrade to Manchester. We also hear from former coaches and players about how his childhood shaped him into the person he is today and his lasting impact on the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP29: ANDY ROBERTSON
programme.sub-title: From his humble beginnings at Queen’s Park in Scotland to becoming a key player for Liverpool, Andy Robertson’s rise is a tale of resilience, hard work, and determination. We delve in to his early struggles, his breakthrough at Hull City, and his crucial role in Liverpool's historic Premier League and Champions League triumphs. Featuring exclusive interviews with teammates, coaches, and Robertson himself, this episode celebrates his leadership, passion, and relentless spirit on and off the pitch.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP27: ROBBIE FOWLER
programme.sub-title: Robbie Fowler's footballing journey started in the humble surrounds of Toxteth, Liverpool and ended with him being widely considered to be one of the finest finishers the game’s ever seen. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP27: ROBBIE FOWLER
programme.sub-title: Robbie Fowler's footballing journey started in the humble surrounds of Toxteth, Liverpool and ended with him being widely considered to be one of the finest finishers the game’s ever seen. Fowler talks to The Big Interview about his life and career, revealing his favourite goal scored and why, his hopes to one day manage in the Premier League and how he believes former Reds boss, Jurgen Klopp will go down as one of the greatest managers the club’s ever seen.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP29: ANDY ROBERTSON
programme.sub-title: From his humble beginnings at Queen’s Park in Scotland to becoming a key player for Liverpool, Andy Robertson’s rise is a tale of resilience, hard work, and determination. We delve in to his early struggles, his breakthrough at Hull City, and his crucial role in Liverpool's historic Premier League and Champions League triumphs. Featuring exclusive interviews with teammates, coaches, and Robertson himself, this episode celebrates his leadership, passion, and relentless spirit on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP37: (Subbed) NANI
programme.sub-title: A player of flair and flamboyance for Sir Alex Ferguson’s Manchester United, the story of Nani from the streets of Lisbon is one of defying the odds. Nani retraces his footsteps across Portugal’s capital, visiting old clubs and former coaches, the neighbourhood he learnt to survive in, as well as new ventures afoot.
programme.desc: A player of flair and flamboyance for Sir Alex Ferguson’s Manchester United, the story of Nani from the streets of Lisbon is one of defying the odds. Nani retraces his footsteps across Portugal’s capital, visiting old clubs and former coaches, the neighbourhood he learnt to survive in, as well as new ventures afoot.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP27: ROBBIE FOWLER
programme.sub-title: Robbie Fowler's footballing journey started in the humble surrounds of Toxteth, Liverpool and ended with him being widely considered to be one of the finest finishers the game’s ever seen. Fowler talks to The Big Interview about his life and career, revealing his favourite goal scored and why, his hopes to one day manage in the Premier League and how he believes former Reds boss, Jurgen Klopp will go down as one of the greatest managers the club’s ever seen.
programme.desc: Robbie Fowler's footballing journey started in the humble surrounds of Toxteth, Liverpool and ended with him being widely considered to be one of the finest finishers the game’s ever seen. programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Liverpool v Wolverhampton Wanderers / Tottenham Hotspur v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: A super Sunday in the Premier League awaits with the main clash of the weekend coming in North London as Tottenham face Manchester United. Michael Owen, Glenn Hoddle and Dimitar Berbatov will provide expert analysis for that game plus leaders Liverpool taking on Wolves in the early kick off.
